title: PU Result 2026 - Panjab University, Chandigarh M.Sc and MBA Results (OUT)

detail.title: PU Result 2026 - Panjab University, Chandigarh M.Sc and MBA Results (OUT)
detail.short_info: PU Result 2025: Panjab University, Chandigarh Result 2025 has been released on puchd.ac.in. Here is the direct Link to check your UG and PG Course (M.Sc and MBA) Results Online.

sections.heading: PU Result 2026 - Panjab University, Chandigarh M.Sc and MBA Results (OUT)

content.text: PU Result 2026: Panjab University, Chandigarh has declared the 1st and 2nd Semester results for M.Sc and MBA on puchd.ac.in. Students can check their PU results 2026 online by entering roll number/registration number. Download your PU mark sheet PDF using the direct link below.

items: Result Status: Released
Exam Name: 1st and 2nd Semester
University: Panjab University, Chandigarh (PU)
Courses: M.Sc and MBA
Result Available At: puchd.ac.in
Documents Required: Roll Number/Registration Number

sections.heading: PU Result 2026 Direct Link - Check Here
How to Check PU Result 2026 Online?

content.text: Students can check their PU result 2026 for 1st and 2nd Semester by following these simple steps:

items: Visit Official Website: Go to puchd.ac.in
Find Results Section: Click on "Results" or "Examination" tab on homepage
Select Your Exam: Choose 1st and 2nd Semester from the list
Enter Details: Input your Roll Number and Registration Number
Submit & View: Click "Submit" to view your PU result 2026
Download: Save/print your mark sheet PDF for future reference

content.text: To check your PU results 2026, students must have the following details ready:

items: Roll Number (as mentioned on admit card)
Registration Number or Application Number
Date of Birth (if required)
Course and Semester details

content.text: After checking your PU result 2026, follow these steps to download your mark sheet:

items: View your result on the screen
Click on "Download Mark Sheet" or "Print" button
Save the PDF file to your device
Take multiple printouts for official use
Verify all details (name, roll number, marks) are correct
